notes: Group coordinator routing: Play/Pause/Next/Prev, play mode, crossfade, and sleep timer now target the zone's group coordinator instead of the selected speaker's own IP, so gestures work correctly on a grouped/following speaker. Also fixes speakerless zone players (e.g. Connect:Amp) being silently dropped from discovery. Live gesture panel now shows the actual triggered action (e.g. 'Next track') instead of just the raw gesture, with a red 'failed'/'unassigned' state when nothing happened.
